meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Unabyss for Claude
products.tagline: Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude
products.summaryZh: 所有应用和大语言模型共享内存。在Claude中
products.descriptionZh: Claude 不知道 GPT 内部发生了什么。它们都不真正了解你是谁，或者你的公司做什么。现在，它们可以了。Unabyss 为 Claude 提供来自你其他 AI 代理和日常应用中的记忆：邮件、Drive、GitHub、Notion、会议记录器，以及 20 多个其他来源。它也会保存新的记忆，因此 GPT 和 Cursor 能在完全相同的上下文中保持同步——比逐个将每个工具接入 Claude 更精准。终于，有了一个真正跟随你的记忆。私密。可携带。
products.description: Claude doesn't know what happens in GPT. Neither one really knows who you are or what your company does. Now they can. Unabyss gives Claude memories from your other AI agents and everyday apps: email, Drive, GitHub, Notion, meeting recorders, and 20+ more. It saves new memories too, so GPT and Cursor stay in sync with the exact same context - sharper than wiring each tool into Claude one by one. Finally, a real memory that follows you. Private. Portable.

products.name: Pebbles Ai
products.tagline: AI sales platform for modern B2B teams
products.summaryZh: 面向现代B2B团队的AI销售平台
products.descriptionZh: 唯一需要的GTM编排平台，助您成功将产品与服务推向市场。Pebbles AI是一套专为B2B营收团队打造的上市操作系统。它将策略、线索生成、外联、销售及共享公司知识整合至一个AI驱动的工作空间。通过基于您业务训练的神经符号AI，帮助团队规划营销活动、个性化外联、生成合格线索，并在无需切换多个脱节GTM工具的情况下执行。
products.description: The only GTM orchestration platform you will need to successfully take your products & services to market. Pebbles AI is a Go-To-Market Operating System built for B2B revenue teams. It brings strategy, lead generation, outreach, sales, & shared company knowledge into one AI-powered workspace. Using neurosymbolic AI trained on your business, it helps teams plan campaigns, personalize outreach, generate qualified leads, & execute without switching between disconnected GTM tools.

products.name: Kimi K3
products.tagline: The world's first open 3T-class model
products.summaryZh: 全球首个开源3T级模型
products.descriptionZh: Kimi K3 是全球首个开源3T级模型——在编程、知识工作和推理方面均达到前沿性能，具备原生多模态能力及100万上下文窗口。
products.description: Kimi K3 is the world's first open 3T-class model — frontier performance across coding, knowledge work, and reasoning, with native multimodality and 1M context.

products.name: Pocket Screen
products.tagline: Keep any Mac window visible in a floating mini screen
products.summaryZh: 将任意Mac窗口固定在浮动小屏幕上显示
products.descriptionZh: Pocket Screen 可将 Mac 上最前端的窗口转换为紧凑且始终置顶的画中画视图。在另一款应用中工作时，无需频繁切换窗口，即可让文档、聊天记录、视频或参考资料保持可见。所有处理均在 Mac 本地完成。
products.description: Pocket Screen turns the frontmost window on your Mac into a compact, always-on-top PiP-style view. Keep documents, chats, videos, or reference material visible while you work in another app—without constantly switching windows. Processing stays on your Mac.

products.name: Timely
products.tagline: Pull your calendar availability in 3 seconds
products.summaryZh: 3秒内拉取你的日历空闲时间
products.descriptionZh: 一键拉取已关联日历中的空闲时段，自动适配收件人最合适的时区。无需打开日历，无需计算时差，支持多位高管日程统筹。完全隐私保护，数据仅存于本地设备，仅连接Outlook和Google日历。
products.description: Pull your availability from connected calendars, with a single keystroke, within whichever timezone suits your recipient best. No opening the calendar, no timezone maths, and it handles multiple execs too. It's completely private and sits locally on your machine, connecting only to Outlook and Google.

products.name: Basedash Suggestions
products.tagline: Your AI data analyst, now with ideas of its own.
products.summaryZh: 你的AI数据分析师，现在有了自己的想法。
products.descriptionZh: Basedash现在能在你提问之前就给出分析建议。它会研究你连接的数据、过往对话以及已创建的仪表盘，然后生成个性化建议——值得追问的问题、值得构建的仪表盘、值得安排的自动化任务。点击任一建议，工作即刻启动。已采纳的想法会被新建议取代，灵感永不枯竭。每条建议都针对个人生成，覆盖增长、财务和运营等场景。告别空白页面，你的分析师率先出击。
products.description: Basedash now suggests the analysis before you ask. It studies your connected data, your past chats, and the dashboards you've built, then generates personalized suggestions — questions worth asking, dashboards worth building, automations worth scheduling. Click one and the work starts. Used ideas are replaced with fresh ones, so the well never runs dry. Every suggestion is generated per person, for growth, finance, and ops alike. No more blank page. Your analyst makes the first move.

products.name: Scribble Party
products.tagline: A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators
products.summaryZh: 面向教师与创作者的本地优先白板工作室
products.descriptionZh: 大多数课程录制工具需要先将视频上传到云端，并要求注册账户。而Scribble Party完全在浏览器中运行。你可以在无限画布上绘制，将实时摄像头气泡（自动去除背景）拖到画板上，并录制整个过程及你的声音。录制内容会直接保存到你的设备中，即使标签页崩溃也不会丢失录制内容。作为可安装的应用，它支持离线使用。无需注册、无需安装，数据永不外传！
products.description: Most lesson recorders send your video to someone's cloud and want an account first. Scribble Party runs entirely in your browser. Draw on an infinite canvas, drop a live camera bubble of yourself on the board (it cuts out your background), and record the whole thing with your voice. Recordings save to your device as you go, so a crashed tab doesn't lose a take. Works offline as an installed app. No signup, no install, nothing ever uploaded!

products.name: Aye
products.tagline: Your teachable AI intern for everyday browser work
products.summaryZh: 你的可教学AI实习生，用于日常浏览器工作
products.descriptionZh: Aye 是一款基于 Chromium 内核、适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的 AI 浏览器，它为你提供了一位可教学的 AI 助手来处理网页工作。它能读取可见页面、规划步骤，并通过常规浏览器操作（点击、输入、滚动、切换标签页、检查结果）来执行任务。支持页面摘要、跨标签页研究、草拟回复，以及自动化可重复的工作流程。将重复性任务转化为可复用的技能，通过配置文件隔离不同账户，并通过可审查的进度和对敏感步骤的审批机制保持可控。
products.description: Aye is a Chromium-based AI browser for macOS and Windows that gives web work a teachable AI intern. It reads visible pages, plans steps, and works through normal browser actions: clicking, typing, scrolling, switching tabs, and checking results. Summarize pages, research across tabs, draft replies, and automate repeatable workflows. Turn recurring tasks into reusable skills, separate accounts with profiles, and stay in control with reviewable progress and approval for sensitive steps.

products.name: PixyCAD
products.tagline: Fast & precise 3D CAD built natively for iPad and Mac
products.summaryZh: 为iPad和Mac原生打造，快速精准的3D CAD
products.descriptionZh: PixyCAD 是一款面向 Mac 和 iPad 的原生 3D CAD 应用，专为创客、设计师和 3D 打印爱好者打造，旨在提供专业实体建模能力，同时避免传统 CAD 的复杂性。它将易用的建模工作流与基于 Parasolid 的专业几何内核相结合。我们正在 Product Hunt 上线，希望从关注 CAD、3D 打印以及 Apple 平台上更优质创意工具的用户那里获得反馈。
products.description: PixyCAD is a native 3D CAD app for Mac and iPad, built for makers, designers and 3D-printing enthusiasts who want professional solid modelling without traditional CAD complexity. It combines an approachable modelling workflow with a professional geometry foundation powered by Parasolid. We are launching on Product Hunt to get feedback from people who care about CAD, 3D printing and better creative tools on Apple platforms.

products.name: Kimi K3
products.tagline: The world's first open 3T-class model
products.summaryZh: 全球首个开源3T级模型
products.descriptionZh: Kimi K3 是一款拥有 2.8T 参数的开源模型，具备原生视觉能力、100 万 token 上下文窗口，并采用月之暗面（Moonshot AI）的 Kimi Delta Attention 与 Attention Residuals 架构。作为全球首个开源的 3T 级模型，它在长周期编程、编译器开发、数字创作和科学推理方面展现出前沿性能，在扩展效率与智能体能力上超越此前开源模型。
products.description: Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter open model featuring native vision capabilities, a 1-million-token context window, and Moonshot AI's Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals architectures. Built as the world's first open 3T-class model, it delivers frontier-level performance in long-horizon coding, compiler development, digital creation, and scientific reasoning, outperforming previous open models in scaling efficiency and agentic capabilities.

products.name: isvisible.ai?
products.tagline: Free AI visibility audit
products.summaryZh: 免费AI可见度审计
products.descriptionZh: 免费AI可见性审计。检测ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity和Google AI能否访问你的网站。即时获取0-100分的评分，并查看每个AI代理的访问详情。
products.description: Free AI visibility audit. Find out whether ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Google AI can access your website. Get an instant 0–100 score with an access breakdown for each agent.

products.name: PH Daily Top 50
products.tagline: The day's top 50 launches, each summarized by AI
products.summaryZh: 每日最热50款新品，AI为您逐一解读
products.descriptionZh: 一份免费、开源的每日精选，收录当天获赞最多的50个产品发布——每个都配有简短、通俗的AI摘要，说明其功能、目标用户和亮点。用两分钟浏览全天内容，无需打开50个标签页。每日排名稳定后自动更新，保留最近7天记录，无需注册账号。可按类别筛选或搜索所有摘要。开源（MIT协议）——可用自己的API密钥运行独立副本。
products.description: A free, open-source digest of the 50 most-upvoted launches each day — each with a short, plain-English AI summary of what it does, who it's for, and what stands out. Skim the whole day in two minutes instead of opening 50 tabs. It updates automatically once the daily rankings settle, keeps the last 7 days, and needs no account. Filter by category or search across every summary. Open source (MIT) — run your own copy with your own API keys.

products.name: Vetta X
products.tagline: Scale your personal brand on X with automated AI agents
products.summaryZh: 在X平台上通过自动化AI代理扩展你的个人品牌
products.descriptionZh: Vetta X 是专为 X 平台打造的 AI 增长工作空间。追踪创作者时收到回复提醒，由 Vetta AI 代理以你的风格撰写草稿，一键发布。一切尽在掌控。
products.description: Vetta X is the AI growth workspace for X. Reply alerts on the creators you track, drafts written in your voice by the Vetta AI agent, one-tap publish. You stay in control.

products.name: Convert PDF to Excel
products.tagline: Turn any PDF into an editable Excel sheet — one click
products.summaryZh: 一键将任意PDF转换为可编辑的Excel表格
products.descriptionZh: PDF转Excel是一款免费的Chrome扩展，可一键将PDF转换为整洁、可编辑的电子表格。基于文本的PDF会立即在本地解析——数据不会离开你的设备。扫描件或图像PDF则通过HTTPS进行AI表格提取。无需登录、无文件大小限制、无需订阅。
products.description: Convert PDF to Excel is a free Chrome extension that turns PDFs into clean, editable spreadsheets in one click. Text-based PDFs are parsed instantly and locally — nothing leaves your machine. Scanned or image PDFs get AI-powered table extraction over HTTPS. No login, no size limits, no subscription.

products.name: WizeMe.APP: Personal Life Partner OS
products.tagline: Private AI memory for clearer decisions and follow-through
products.summaryZh: 私密AI记忆，助你更清晰地决策与跟进
products.descriptionZh: WizeMe.APP 是一款私密思考伙伴，能记住你在对话、决策、人际关系和日常习惯中选择保留的上下文。晨间简报与晚间复盘让一天保持连贯。视觉镜像展示证据、信心和来源缺口，并从你的反馈中学习。决策简报与艰难对话准备将反思转化为行动。记忆保持授权管理、来源标注且可导出。免费试用14天。
products.description: WizeMe.APP is a private thinking partner that remembers the context you choose to keep across conversations, decisions, relationships, and daily rituals. Morning Brief and Nightly De-brief keep the day connected. Visual Mirror shows evidence, confidence, and source gaps, then learns from your feedback. Decision Briefs and Hard-Talk Prep turn reflection into action. Memory stays permissioned, source-labeled, and exportable. Start free for 14 days.

products.name: Dream Pixel AI
products.tagline: AI Image to Image Generator with Free Credits
products.summaryZh: AI图像生成器（免费积分）
products.descriptionZh: 用AI瞬间变换图像。上传照片，在线免费生成新风格、背景、角色、肖像及创意变体。
products.description: Transform images instantly with AI. Upload a photo and generate new styles, backgrounds, characters, portraits, and creative variations online for free.

products.name: Phrase
products.tagline: Your AI notes can edit themselves
products.summaryZh: 你的AI笔记可以自行编辑。
products.descriptionZh: 每个AI笔记应用都在笔记旁加个聊天框。Phrase的智能体内置于原生块编辑器中：你提问，它直接重写笔记本身，而非在侧边生成回复。源文件可读，后续追问一键触达。它从不主动发送。数据存于你的iCloud，而非我们的服务器。
products.description: Every AI note app bolts a chat box beside your note. Phrase's agent works inside a native block editor: you ask, it rewrites the note itself, not a reply on the side. Sources read, follow-ups one tap away. It never sends on its own. Your iCloud, not ours.

products.name: CartHappy
products.tagline: Splits your grocery cart across stores, automatically
products.summaryZh: 自动将购物车商品拆分到不同商店
products.descriptionZh: 大多数生鲜应用只展示单一门店的优惠。CartHappy每日对比1万家门店的3.5亿条价格，自动应用所有优惠券，并按当周最低价拆分购物车。它还能学习你的常购清单并自动构建购物车——WXYZ底特律电视台在直播中测试，当场为一个家庭节省28美元。我们将其做成浏览器扩展，因为这种横向架构能嵌入各零售商环境，帮助消费者跨店比价，而非局限于单一门店。
products.description: Most grocery apps show you deals inside one store. CartHappy compares 350M prices a day across 10,000 stores, auto-applies every coupon, and splits your cart to whatever's cheapest that week. It can also learn your regular list and build your cart automatically — WXYZ Detroit tested it live on TV, saving a family $28 instantly. We built ours as an extension because it works horizontally, sitting inside each retailer's environment while helping the shopper shop across stores, not locked into one.

products.name: Yapper Leaderboard
products.tagline: See the biggest startup yappers on X/Twitter
products.summaryZh: 在X/Twitter上关注最活跃的初创企业发声者
products.descriptionZh: Yapper 排行榜根据 Twitter/X 上的初创公司和用户的“话痨”程度进行排名。曝光量最高的初创公司会升至每日排行榜榜首。关注每周增长榜，留意哪些人和公司正在上升趋势！登录 X 即可将你的公司和团队添加到排行榜中！
products.description: The Yapper Leaderboard ranks Twitter/X's startups and users by how much they yap. The startups with the most impressions climb to the top of the daily leaderboard. See weekly growers to keep your eye on which people and companies are trending upwards! Sign into X to add your company and team to the leaderboard!

products.name: Tilores Studio desktop entity resolution
products.tagline: Entity resolution on your machine. No cloud, no signup.
products.summaryZh: 在你的设备上进行实体解析。无需云端，无需注册。
products.descriptionZh: 实体解析历来是企业级软件的范畴：预约演示、签署大单，然后才能看到它在你的数据上运行。Tilores Studio改变了这一点。它搭载了与云端产品相同的实时匹配引擎，完全在你的机器上运行。加载你的CSV文件，实时解析重复数据，所有操作都不离开你的笔记本电脑。现在，本地MCP服务器让Claude Code、Codex及其他AI助手能够搜索、导入并引导Studio处理你的数据。免费支持多达10万条记录。支持macOS、Windows、Linux系统。
products.description: Entity resolution has always been enterprise software: book a demo, sign a big contract before you see it run on your data. Tilores Studio changes that. The same real-time matching engine behind our cloud product, running entirely on your machine. Load your CSV, resolve duplicates live, nothing leaves your laptop. Now a local MCP server lets Claude Code, Codex and other AI assistants search, import and steer Studio against your data. Free up to 100k records. macOS, Windows, Linux.
